results.question: Does `npm run build` complete without TypeScript errors or compilation failures?

evidence.findings: npm run build exits with code 0. All 7 pages compiled: /, /topics, /leaderboard, /settings, /study-times, /topic/[slug], /404

results.examiner_notes: Build succeeds cleanly. TypeScript strict mode passes.

results.question: Do all 6 required routes exist and render a page heading?

evidence.findings: All 6 routes exist as page files. Each renders a Heading component. E2E tests confirm all pages load with headings.

results.examiner_notes: All routes confirmed by E2E tests passing.

results.question: Is the shared navigation component present on all pages?

evidence.findings: Layout component wraps all pages via _app.tsx. Nav has aria-label='Main navigation'. Links to Topics, Leaderboard, Study Times, Settings all present. E2E test confirms navigation visible.

results.examiner_notes: Navigation consistent across all pages via Layout wrapper.

results.question: Are all TypeScript types from spec section 4.3 defined in src/types/index.ts?

evidence.findings: All required types defined: Topic, QuizQuestion (union: single/multi/flashcard), Option, StudyPlan, StudyStep, StudyTask (union: quiz/notes/flashcards/custom), Settings, SelectedTopics, TopicProgress, Progress, StudySession, StudyTimes. STORAGE_KEYS constant also defined.

results.examiner_notes: All spec types are present and correctly match spec section 4.3.

results.question: Is Chakra UI v2 correctly integrated with the app?

evidence.findings: Chakra UI v2.10.9 installed. ChakraProvider wraps app in _app.tsx with calmTheme. extendTheme used correctly. Brand color palette (teal-based) defined in theme.ts.

results.examiner_notes: Chakra UI v2 confirmed. Both calm and playful themes defined for Story 08 use.

results.question: Do all Playwright E2E tests in story-01-scaffold.spec.ts pass?

evidence.findings: 6/6 E2E tests pass: home page title, navigation links, topics navigation, leaderboard, study-times, settings pages all verified.

results.examiner_notes: All 6 tests pass in 1.8s using system Playwright chromium browser.

results.question: Is the app configured for static export?

evidence.findings: output: 'export' and trailingSlash: true set in next.config.mjs

results.examiner_notes: Static export configured correctly for CDN hosting.

test_gate.evidence: Build: 7/7 pages compiled successfully. TypeScript: 0 errors.
